assertions.assertion: Overrides ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync in a DynamicClientRegistrationValidator subclass
assertions.rationale: Does not extend DynamicClientRegistrationValidator or override ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync. Creates a standalone SoftwareStatementValidator class.

assertions.assertion: Calls context.SetError when the software statement is missing or invalid
assertions.rationale: Does not use context.SetError(). Returns a custom SoftwareStatementResult.Failed() object instead of using the Duende context pattern.

assertions.assertion: Validates the JWT software statement using JsonWebTokenHandler or equivalent with ValidIssuer set to the trusted issuer URL
assertions.rationale: Uses JsonWebTokenHandler with ValidIssuer = 'https://trusted-issuer.example.com' in TokenValidationParameters.

assertions.assertion: Maps claims from the software statement (e.g. software_name) to context.Client properties
assertions.rationale: Maps software_name to a Client object, but not through context.Client. Uses a standalone pattern outside of the Duende DCR context.

assertions.assertion: Calls base.ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync at the end of successful validation
assertions.rationale: Does not call base.ValidateSoftwareStatementAsync(). Not extending the DynamicClientRegistrationValidator so no base call exists.
